meta.label: Particles
meta.note: Flat catalog of particle (PTFX) effects. A particle is a (dict, effect) pair: REQUEST_NAMED_PTFX_ASSET(dict) then START_PARTICLE_FX_*(effect). category = dictionary. Curated effects carry a friendly name (curated: true); the rest have name === effect. No images, no hash. index.json is compact; per-dictionary slices live under by-category/.
